personas.name: Interrupted Session User
personas.description: A Headspace user who meditates on mobile but is blocked by crashes and freezes during sessions.
goals: Finish meditation sessions without the app stopping
Keep a meditation streak without switching to the website
pain_points: Clearing cache and reinstalling does not always fix stability
context: Uses Android (including some Moto/other device builds)
constraints: Limited patience for troubleshooting between sessions
Expects core playback to be reliable
personas.notes: The auto name was too generic so I renamed it. The rest is based on H1 reviews about crashes mid-session.

personas.name: Audio-Focused Listener
personas.description: A user who relies on Headspace audio for relaxation and gets frustrated when sessions load slowly or audio drops.
goals: Listen without losing the audio stream
pain_points: Content loads slowly or feels buggy
Audio stream can cut out during playback
context: Uses the app for meditation and wind-down
Often locks the screen or backgrounds the app while listening
constraints: Does not want to babysit the app during a session
personas.notes: Adjusted wording to focus on slow loading and audio dropouts, which is what H2 reviews mostly talk about.

personas.name: Paying User Seeking Clarity
personas.description: A user evaluating or paying for Headspace who worries about paywall clarity, refund support, and whether premium access works as expected.
goals: Understand trial and subscription terms before paying
Get refunds or account issues resolved without long delays
pain_points: Surprise paywall or card details before trial feels unfair
Refund or customer-service experiences can be slow or unclear
Paid sessions may stop early or fail to play reliably
context: Uses Headspace to manage stress and sleep
Has paid or attempted premium content
constraints: Needs transparent pricing and access rules
Wants a clear in-app path to help for billing problems
personas.notes: The auto version mentioned binaural beats and white noise which is more of a Calm thing. I changed the pain points to match what H3 reviews actually say about Headspace (trial, paywall, refunds).

personas.name: Catalog Browser
personas.description: A user who explores Headspace content often and wants the app to stay responsive while browsing courses, sleep content, and recommendations.
goals: Navigate the app without sluggish UI or repeated restarts
pain_points: App can feel bloated or unresponsive after major updates
Occasional frustration with how often the app needs restart
context: Uses multiple content types (sleep, stress, focus)
Opens and closes the app throughout the day
constraints: Needs predictable navigation and resume behavior
Wants marketing nudges controllable in-app, not via vague email rules
personas.notes: Removed email spam as a main pain point since that's not really an in-app issue. Focused on browsing and UI responsiveness instead.

personas.name: Locked-Out Returning User
personas.description: A user who cannot reliably access the full Headspace catalog because of login issues or false offline errors, even on a stable connection.
goals: Log in on first try with linked accounts
Open the catalog without bogus offline errors
pain_points: Sees 'offline' or not responding errors while online
Tracks may stop midway; login flows feel flaky
context: Uses Wi‑Fi/mobile data that works for other apps
May use Google or email-based login
constraints: Needs actionable error text and recovery steps
Does not want repeated reinstall cycles
personas.notes: Kept the same focus as auto but rewrote to match H5 complaints about false offline errors and login failures.
